mapper.insert: /* wms-outbound-obAllocateReleaseManager-sql-oracle.xml - insertManualAlDt - 출고 관리 > 할당(RELEASE) > 수동할당 - 할당 테이블에 데이터 insert */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_AL_DT ( CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , OBDTKEY /*릴리즈상세코드*/ , ALSEQ /*할당순번*/ , ALDIVCD /*할당구분코드*/ , IVATKEY /*재고속성코드*/ , LCKEY /*로케이션코드*/ , CELLKEY /*셀코드*/ , ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , UOM /*상품단위유형*/ , ALQTY /*할당수량*/ , ALSTRGID /*할당전략아이디*/ , PIHDKEY /*피킹헤더코드*/ , PIDTKEY /*피킹상세코드*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ ) VALUES ( #{ctkey} /*센터코드*/ , #{owkey} /*화주코드*/ , #{obhdkey} /*릴리즈코드*/ , #{obdtkey} /*릴리즈상세코드*/ , #{alseq} /*할당순번*/ , #{aldivcd} /*할당구분코드*/ , #{ivatkey} /*재고속성코드*/ , #{lckey} /*로케이션코드*/ , #{cellkey} /*셀코드*/ , #{ickey} /*상품코드*/ , #{uom} /*상품단위유형*/ , #{alqty} /*할당수량*/ , #{alstrgid} /*할당전략아이디*/ , #{pihdkey} /*피킹헤더코드*/ , #{pidtkey} /*피킹상세코드*/ , #{sysdate} /*입력일시*/ , #{surkey} /*입력자*/ , #{sysdate} /*수정일시*/ , #{surkey} /*수정자*/ )
mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obAllocateReleaseManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectCancelProcList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 할당(RELEASE) > 할당취소 - 할당 취소할 주문정보 조회 */ SELECT OD.CTKEY , OD.OWKEY , OD.OBHDKEY , OD.OBDTKEY , AL.ALSEQ , AL.ICKEY , AL.LCKEY , AL.IVATKEY , AL.UOM , AL.ALQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_AL_DT AL ON OD.CTKEY = AL.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = AL.OWKEY AND OD.OBHDKEY = AL.OBHDKEY AND OD.OBDTKEY = AL.OBDTKEY WHERE OD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OD.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OD.OBDTKEY = #{obdtkey} AND OD.OBDTSTATUSCD IN ('05','10') AND OD.ALQTY > 0 ORDER BY AL.IVATKEY, AL.LCKEY

/* wms-outbound-obAllocateRelease-sql-oracle.xml - selectStockOutMap - WMS > 출고 관리 > 할당(RELEASE) > 미할당처리 - 미할당처리 가능(불가) 출고 상세 조회 */ SELECT OD.CTKEY , OD.OWKEY , OD.OBHDKEY , OD.OBDTKEY , OD.ALQTY , OD.EXPCTQTY - ALQTY AS STOCK_OUT_QTY , (CASE WHEN OD.ALQTY = 0 THEN '01' WHEN OD.ALQTY > 0 THEN '10' ELSE OD.OBDTSTATUSCD END) AS OBDTSTATUSCD FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON OD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND OD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY WHERE OD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OD.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OD.OBDTKEY = #{obdtkey} AND OD.EXPCTQTY > 0 AND OD.EXPCTQTY > ALQTY AND OD.OBDTSTATUSCD IN ('00','05','60')
AND OH.WAHDKEY IS NULL AND OH.WKTYPECD IS NULL

/* wms-outbound-obAllocateReleaseManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectAlDtList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 할당(RELEASE) > 자동할당 - 릴리즈 상세 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , OD.OBDTKEY /*릴리즈상세코드*/ , COALESCE(MAX(AL.ALSEQ), 0) + 10 AS ALSEQ /*할당순번*/ , 'A' AS ALDIVCD /*할당 구분코드 : A:자동할당, H:수동할당*/ , OD.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , OD.UOM /*상품단위유형*/ , COALESCE(OD.EXPCTQTY, 0) - COALESCE(OD.ALQTY, 0) AS EXPCTQTY /*예정수량*/ , '' AS PIHDKEY /*피킹헤더코드*/ , '' AS PIDTKEY /*피킹상세코드*/ , #{alstghdkey} AS ALSTGHDKEY /*할당전략아이디*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_AL_DT AL ON OD.CTKEY = AL.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = AL.OWKEY AND OD.OBHDKEY = AL.OBHDKEY AND OD.OBDTKEY = AL.OBDTKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OD.OBDTKEY = #{obdtkey} AND OD.EXPCTQTY > 0 AND OD.EXPCTQTY > OD.ALQTY
AND OD.OBDTSTATUSCD IN ('00','05')
AND OH.WAHDKEY IS NULL AND OH.WKTYPECD IS NULL
GROUP BY OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OD.OBDTKEY , OD.ICKEY , OD.UOM , OD.EXPCTQTY , OD.ALQTY

/* wms-outbound-obAllocateReleaseManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectIvatxList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 할당(RELEASE) > 자동할당 - 재고 조회 */ WITH IVAT AS ( SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , ICKEY , IVATKEY , LCKEY , AVQTY , EXPCTQTY , RN FROM (
) IV ), AVQTYSUM AS ( SELECT P.*, SUM(AVQTY) OVER (ORDER BY RN ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS CUM_SUM, SUM(AVQTY) OVER (ORDER BY RN ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS PREV_SUM FROM IVAT P ), RESULT AS ( SELECT AVQTYSUM.*, CASE WHEN EXPCTQTY <= COALESCE(PREV_SUM, 0) THEN 0 WHEN EXPCTQTY >= CUM_SUM THEN AVQTY ELSE EXPCTQTY - COALESCE(PREV_SUM, 0) END AS ALQTY FROM AVQTYSUM ) SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , ICKEY , IVATKEY , LCKEY , AVQTY , EXPCTQTY , ALQTY , SUM(ALQTY) OVER (PARTITION BY CTKEY, OWKEY, ICKEY) AS ALTOTQTY FROM RESULT WHERE ALQTY > 0 ORDER BY RN

/* wms-outbound-obAllocateReleaseManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectFixAllocateIvatTarget - WMS > 출고 관리 > 할당(RELEASE) > 자동할당 - 덕용, 단포 전용 할당대상 색인 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , ICKEY , IVATKEY , LCKEY , AVQTY , EXPCTQTY , EXPCTQTY AS ALQTY , RN FROM () IV WHERE IV.AVQTY >= IV.EXPCTQTY ORDER BY RN ) LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: /* wms-outbound-obAllocateReleaseManager-sql-oracle.xml - insertAutoProcAlDt - 출고 관리 > 할당(RELEASE) > 자동할당 - 할당 테이블에 데이터 insert */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_AL_DT ( CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , OBDTKEY /*릴리즈상세코드*/ , ALSEQ /*할당순번*/ , ALDIVCD /*할당구분코드*/ , IVATKEY /*재고속성코드*/ , LCKEY /*로케이션코드*/ , CELLKEY /*셀코드*/ , ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , UOM /*상품단위유형*/ , ALQTY /*할당수량*/ , ALSTRGID /*할당전략아이디*/ , PIHDKEY /*피킹헤더코드*/ , PIDTKEY /*피킹상세코드*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ ) VALUES ( #{ctkey} /*센터코드*/ , #{owkey} /*화주코드*/ , #{obhdkey} /*릴리즈코드*/ , #{obdtkey} /*릴리즈상세코드*/ , #{alseq} /*할당순번*/ , #{aldivcd} /*할당구분코드*/ , #{ivatkey} /*재고속성코드*/ , #{lckey} /*로케이션코드*/ , #{cellkey} /*셀코드*/ , #{ickey} /*상품코드*/ , #{uom} /*상품단위유형*/ , #{alqty} /*할당수량*/ , #{alstrgid} /*할당전략아이디*/ , #{pihdkey} /*피킹헤더코드*/ , #{pidtkey} /*피킹상세코드*/ , #{sysdate} /*입력일시*/ , #{surkey} /*입력자*/ , #{sysdate} /*수정일시*/ , #{surkey} /*수정자*/ )
mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obAllocateReleaseManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectMidAlDtList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 할당(RELEASE) > 이고할당 - 릴리즈 상세 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , OD.OBDTKEY /*릴리즈상세코드*/ , COALESCE(MAX(AL.ALSEQ), 0) + 10 AS ALSEQ /*할당순번*/ , 'A' AS ALDIVCD /*할당 구분코드 : A:자동할당, H:수동할당*/ , OD.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , OD.UOM /*상품단위유형*/ , (MAX(COALESCE(OD.EXPCTQTY, 0)) - MAX(COALESCE(OD.ALQTY, 0))) AS EXPCTQTY /*예정수량*/ , '' AS PIHDKEY /*피킹헤더코드*/ , '' AS PIDTKEY /*피킹상세코드*/ , '' AS ALSTGHDKEY /*할당전략아이디*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_AL_DT AL ON OD.CTKEY = AL.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = AL.OWKEY AND OD.OBHDKEY = AL.OBHDKEY AND OD.OBDTKEY = AL.OBDTKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OD.OBDTKEY = #{obdtkey} AND OD.EXPCTQTY > 0 AND OD.EXPCTQTY > OD.ALQTY AND OH.OBHDTYPECD = '30' AND OD.OBDTSTATUSCD IN ('00','05') GROUP BY OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OD.OBDTKEY , OD.ICKEY , OD.UOM , OD.EXPCTQTY

/* wms-outbound-obAllocateReleaseManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectMidIvatxRowIdList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 할당(RELEASE) > 이고할당 - 재고 ROWID 조회 */ SELECT (IVATX.ctid)::TEXT AS RID FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLC IVATX INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT IVAT ON IVATX.CTKEY = IVAT.CTKEY AND IVATX.OWKEY = IVAT.OWKEY AND IVATX.ICKEY = IVAT.ICKEY AND IVATX.IVATKEY = IVAT.IVATKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC LC ON IVATX.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND IVATX.LCKEY = LC.LCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_AR AR ON LC.CTKEY = AR.CTKEY AND LC.ARKEY = AR.ARKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ZN ZN ON AR.CTKEY = ZN.CTKEY AND AR.ZNKEY = ZN.ZNKEY AND ZN.ZNKEY = 'MLD' WHERE IVATX.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND IVATX.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IVATX.ICKEY = #{ickey} AND IVATX.IVSTATUSCD = '10' AND IVATX.AVQTY > 0 ORDER BY IVAT.EXPDATE , IVATX.LCKEY

/* wms-outbound-obAllocateReleaseManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectMidIvatxList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 할당(RELEASE) > 이고할당 - 재고 조회 */ WITH IVAT AS (
), AVQTYSUM AS ( SELECT P.*, SUM(AVQTY) OVER (ORDER BY RN ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS CUM_SUM, SUM(AVQTY) OVER (ORDER BY RN ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS PREV_SUM FROM IVAT P ), RESULT AS ( SELECT AVQTYSUM.*, CASE WHEN EXPCTQTY <= COALESCE(PREV_SUM, 0) THEN 0 WHEN EXPCTQTY >= CUM_SUM THEN AVQTY ELSE EXPCTQTY - COALESCE(PREV_SUM, 0) END AS ALQTY FROM AVQTYSUM ) SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , ICKEY , IVATKEY , LCKEY , AVQTY , EXPCTQTY , ALQTY , SUM(ALQTY) OVER (PARTITION BY CTKEY, OWKEY, ICKEY) AS ALTOTQTY FROM RESULT WHERE ALQTY > 0 ORDER BY RN
mapper.insert: /* wms-outbound-obAllocateReleaseManager-sql-oracle.xml - insertMidAlDt - 출고 관리 > 할당(RELEASE) > 이고할당 - 할당 테이블에 데이터 insert */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_AL_DT ( CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , OBDTKEY /*릴리즈상세코드*/ , ALSEQ /*할당순번*/ , ALDIVCD /*할당구분코드*/ , IVATKEY /*재고속성코드*/ , LCKEY /*로케이션코드*/ , CELLKEY /*셀코드*/ , ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , UOM /*상품단위유형*/ , ALQTY /*할당수량*/ , ALSTRGID /*할당전략아이디*/ , PIHDKEY /*피킹헤더코드*/ , PIDTKEY /*피킹상세코드*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ ) VALUES ( #{ctkey} /*센터코드*/ , #{owkey} /*화주코드*/ , #{obhdkey} /*릴리즈코드*/ , #{obdtkey} /*릴리즈상세코드*/ , #{alseq} /*할당순번*/ , #{aldivcd} /*할당구분코드*/ , #{ivatkey} /*재고속성코드*/ , #{lckey} /*로케이션코드*/ , #{cellkey} /*셀코드*/ , #{ickey} /*상품코드*/ , #{uom} /*상품단위유형*/ , #{alqty} /*할당수량*/ , #{alstrgid} /*할당전략아이디*/ , #{pihdkey} /*피킹헤더코드*/ , #{pidtkey} /*피킹상세코드*/ , #{sysdate} /*입력일시*/ , #{surkey} /*입력자*/ , #{sysdate} /*수정일시*/ , #{surkey} /*수정자*/ )
